message:
fix: check SSH remote before remoteUser in Push/ForcePush/Pull (bd-msdq)

Move the isSSHRemote check before the remoteUser check in all three
functions. When a Hosted Dolt remote uses SSH transport (git+ssh://),
the SQL procedure path would time out because the MySQL connection drops
before SSH transfer completes. Now SSH remotes always use the CLI path,
with federation credentials set via env vars when remoteUser is present.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/slate
